added: result = m_sql.safe_queryBlob("SELECT Image FROM Floorplans WHERE ID=%d", atol(idx.c_str()));
deleted: result = m_sql.safe_queryBlob("SELECT Image FROM Floorplans WHERE ID=%s", idx.c_str());

cve_description: Domoticz before 4.10578 allows SQL Injection via the idx parameter in CWebServer::GetFloorplanImage in WebServer.cpp.
